programme.title: Дневники Темного
programme.desc: Телеканал ТЕТ подготовил для вас нечто очень неожиданное. Проект придется по вкусу всем любителям загадочных мистических историй. События происходят в фантастическом городе Темный. В нем живут вампиры, оборотни и другие существа. Все здесь живет и дышит, даже стены домов. Попасть в этот загадочный город совсем не сложно, а вот покинуть - невероятно сложно. Однажды в город приезжает журналист. Его задача - освещать события, происходящие в Темном. Однако все осложняется тем, что отличить где правда, а где только галлюцинации, в городе бывает невероятно трудно. В каждом выпуске он расследует новые мистические дела. Удастся ли ему раскрыть их и спасти жизни людей? Сможет ли журналист выжить в таинственном городе? А выбраться из него? - Узнавайте в мистическом сериалы "Дневники Темного".

programme.title: Семейные мелодрамы
programme.desc: Это не выдуманные истории, а реконструкция реальных событий, которые могут случиться с каждой семьей. В каждой семье свои "Семейные мелодрамы", конфликты, накопившиеся проблемы с долговыми ямами, изменами, трудными детьми и конфликтами с родителями. Какой выход из этих ситуаций, достигших наивысшего апогея, когда никто не хочет его искать? Как же тогда жить дальше? Эти фильмы не заканчиваются хэппи-эндом, но, тем не менее, они будут интересны самому широкому кругу зрителей: от самых маленьких до людей в возрасте. Сюжет фильма обычно предполагает некое размышление или обсуждение, потому что он поднимает важные философские вопросы, заставляет задуматься о понятиях "любовь", "дружба", "верность", "предательство". Помимо главной мелодраматической линии отношений героев, фильмы из подборки "Семейных мелодрам" содержат и философский, и морально-нравственный подтекст, и авторскую позицию по ключевым вопросам бытия. Вместе с тем, это не нудное поучительное рассуждение. Ленты также повествуют о личном выборе героя в сложных жизненных обстоятельствах, которые будут близки всем зрителям.

programme.title: Extract
programme.desc: Joel Reynolds is the owner and founder of Reynolds Extract, a flavoring-extracts company. Although his business is successful, his marriage lacks passion. He is also often accosted by his annoying neighbor, Nathan. One day, a series of mishaps occur at the extract factory, resulting in an employee, Step, losing a testicle. Cindy, a con artist, reads a news story about the accident. Hatching a get-rich-quick scheme, she gets a temporary job at the factory, manipulating Joel into giving her more information about Step. She also begins a series of petty thefts from her co-workers, who openly accuse each other of the thefts. Although Step initially decides not to sue the company, he changes his mind after a meeting with Cindy, that she sets up in order to meet and flirt with him. Under Cindys influence, Step hires attorney Joe Adler.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones and Samuel L. Jackson star in this riveting saga of a veteran Marine who becomes the scapegoat for a mission that went tragically wrong. Faced with murder charges in a case thats been rigged against him, Col. Terry Childers (Jackson) turns to a former brother-in-arms (Jones) to defend him and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Black Cop
programme.desc: A black police officer gets pushed to the edge after he is profiled and assaulted by the colleagues he worked side by side with, so he decides to get revenge and take his frustrations out on the community that he swore to protect.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Mystery movie. American mystery, produced in 2017. Retired homicide detective Ray Archer and his partner, ex FBI agent Will Ruiney, are assigned to track down a vicious serial killer, who is playing a twisted version of the childrens game Hangman.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Two cop partners, who are also best friends attend a domestic disturbance, only for one to accidentaly critically wound the other. The rest of the police force are suspicious that there may have been no accident.

programme.title: Score: A Hockey Musical
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Farley has led a sheltered life, raised on a diet of home schooling, organic living and trips to the art gallery. To his parents dismay, Farley loves to play hockey with the local kids. To their even greater dismay, Farley is scouted and signed by the owner of a junior league team, where he becomes an instant star. But Farley discovers that stardom comes with a price - including the expectation to fight on the ice. Throw in a changing relationship with his best friend, and Farley finds himself losing his way.

programme.title: House of the Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The action proceeds along two tracks and two time frames. We meet the boy, who lives with his mother in a Budapest apartment house, in the summer of 2012. Another boy is spending his vacation with his grandparents in the same building in the summer of 1982. The house unveils its mysterious secret to both of them.

programme.title: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Director Salvador Litvak and his writing partner, Nina Davidovich Litvak, based their screenplay on their extensive research into Lincolns friendship with Lamon. Saving Lincoln charts their relationship from their initial meeting to Lincolns Presidency. Lamon was a tall, boisterous Southerner who liked to drink whiskey, tell jokes and stories, play the banjo, and wrestle. Despite some pronounced differences between the two men, they shared a fondness for telling jokes and stories, and both felt slavery should be eliminated. Lamon often served as Lincolns private confidant.

programme.title: Irish Jam
programme.desc: A South Central L.A. con artist with rap skills tries to keep bill collectors and his lover, with marriage in mind, at bay by entering a poetry contest staged by a small Irish town. Can his rhyming skills help the town and win him the prize money?

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: Lost in Florence
programme.desc: When Eleroo advises Bumblelion to make a wish when getting the biggest part of the wishbone, it means trouble for poor Rhinokey for losing two bank bags of money. Bumblelion starts spending the money and looses his friends while Rhinokey manages to escape from Officer Eaglebeagle. Rhinokey tries to convince Bumblelion to return the bank bags, but Bumblelion decides to run off thinking that Rhinokey wants to steal his money. Soon after, Bumblelion realizes how Rhinokey lost the bank bags and returns the money to the police.

programme.title: The Sandman
programme.desc: One fine morning, Benno finds sand in his bed. While he tries to ignore this at first, he soon must realize that he himself is loosing the sand. Day after day the sand increases and soon his time literally starts running short. Finally he is left no choice but to ask Sandra for help, who runs a small coffee shop under his apartment. Although Benno hates her with a passion, he started having dreams of her every night. What could Sandra and the dreams have to do with the sand?

programme.title: Operation Chromite
programme.desc: In 1950, just a few months after North Korean forces have overrun most of South Korea, an American-led United Nations Command is deployed to Korea to aid the struggling South Koreans. General Douglas MacArthur devises a secret plan to attack behind enemy lines at the port city of Incheon. The risky strategy is opposed by leaders of the other military branches, forcing MacArthur to devise a clandestine operation to gather essential information from within occupied Incheon by coordinating a weeklong South Korean intelligence operation known as "X-Ray".

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Every ten years in an unsuspecting town, The Tournament takes place. A battle royale between 40 of the worlds deadliest assassins. The last man standing receiving the $10,000,000 cash prize and the title of Worlds No1, which itself carries the legendary million dollar a bullet price tag. All fights are monitored 24hrs a day on redirected CCTV cameras and broadcast secretly to a ring of high stake billionaire gamblers. A gritty, multistranded action-thriller, The Tournament brings together international killers from every imaginable discipline in a blood-bathed contest to the death. We follow the competition favourites through stories of love, betrayal, revenge and redemption as they finally discover the true value of life

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Charlotte is a woman with anger management issues whose therapist suggests she write a journal to keep her emotions in check. Unlucky in love, she ventures online to find a boyfriend. Just as she reaches her limit of unsuccessful dates, Charlotte meets her soul mate Lyle. Everything is perfect until Lyle finds Charlottes journal and sets out to prove just how deeply he loves her.

programme.title: Confidence: After Dark
programme.desc: What Jake Vig doesnt know just might get him killed. A sharp and polished grifter, Jake has just swindled thousands of dollars from the unsuspecting Lionel Dolby with the help of his crew: Insideman Gordo, Shills Miles, and Big Al--and two corrupt LAPD officers, Lloyd Whitworth and Omar Manzano. But when both Lionel and Big Al turn up dead, it becomes clear that Lionel wasnt just any mark--as Jake soon learns, he was an accountant for eccentric crime boss Winston King. Never one to shy away from a challenge, Jake offers to repay "The King" by pulling off the biggest con of his career. The mark? Morgan Gillette, a banker with deep ties to organized crime. With so much riding on the outcome, Jake decides to bring in a brash, blonde pickpocket named Lily, who joins the crew in a scheme involving corporate loans, creative accounting, wire transfers and off-shore accounts. Jake and his crew will have to stay one step ahead of both the criminals and the cops to finally settle their debt.

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A 30-something man decides to marry his pregnant girlfriend and asks his four best friends to stand with him at the wedding, but as he observes his friends relationship troubles, he wrestles with issues of fatherhood, marriage and growing up.

programme.title: Guido Superstar: The Rise of Guido
programme.desc: An Italian immigrant is thrust into the world of drug-lords, supercars and secret agents in this hilarious action comedy. After losing his job at the Disco Valet Company for undue heroism, Guido (Silvio Pollio) must pose as a Sicilian gangster for the FBI in order to infiltrate a powerful Asian gang. Things go sour and take a turn for the worse. Guido must now make amends before he is discovered and killed, or worse, deported.

programme.title: Digging Into China
programme.desc: Harriet, a ten-year old girl, lives together with her big sister and her alcoholic mother out in the countryside. The family runs a motel. Harriet is different from the others, as she owns a great creativity and has nobody to play with. Her infinite world exists only in her mind. One day, Ricky comes along. He is a grown-up, but retarded son of an elderly lady. Soon, Harriet and Ricky share their experiences of life from a different point of view and become close friends. But his mother still plans to give Ricky away into professional care in a home, because she wont live forever to be there for him.

programme.title: No Limit Kids
programme.desc: Ashton, Celeste, and Becca are three unlikely middle school outcasts who form a club in an abandoned theater. There, they meet Charlie (Bill Cobbs, Night at the Museum), a homeless man who shares their passion for musical theater. When the theater is scheduled to be torn down, the teenagers set out to save the landmark with a modern-day performance of Shakespeares Much Ado About Nothing. Along the way, the group learns to treat others with respect and stand up for their beliefs. This Dove-approved film also features Emmy and Golden Globe nominee Lee Meriwether.

programme.title: Baba
programme.desc: An weird but witty old woman is forced to deal with an ambiguous future after her country, family and the entire system of values are ruined. She is trying to solve her existential problems catching d trying to sell a rewarded war criminal as he was a rabbit in a wood. The only thing she did not know if he is really him.

programme.title: Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: The Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding continues the story of 2003s fantasy romance The Prince and Me. In the earlier film, Paige (Julia Stiles) - a midwestern college co-ed - falls in love with Edvard (Luke Mably), sans realizing that he is actually the Prince of Denmark. In this sequel, Paige (now played by neophyte Kam Heskin) and Eddie must confront a centuries-old Danish edict declaring that if a Danish prince marries a commoner, he must abdicate his throne. C

programme.title: Spooner
programme.desc: Facing eviction from his parents home on his 30th birthday, a socially awkward guy meets the girl of his dreams and creates his own rules for growing up.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: Headwinds
programme.desc: Based on Olivier Adams bestselling novel, "Des Vents Contraires," it tells the story of Paul. Since his wife, Sarah, disappeared without a trace, Paul lives alone with his two young children. But a year has passed, a year in which he had to reinvent himself every day—and Paul is exhausted.

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun
programme.desc: David Lowerys crime biopic stars Robert Redford as Forrest Tucker, a real-life bank robber who found himself wanted by police across the United States for a string of prison escapes and robberies. We first meet Tucker in the early 80s. Hes 74 and has been evading police for two years since his last audacious prison break. But hes not taking things easy and laying low. Thats not his bag. This suave old geezer has a somehow enamouring way of walking into a bank, charmingly informing the teller that he has a gun that he doesnt want to use, and walking out with a big old sack of cash. In fact, hes just done exactly that when he meets Jewel (Sissy Spacek), an enchanting farmer who he quickly trusts so much that he decides to reveal to her his true identity. Tucker, alongside spending time on Jewels farm enjoying her more simplistic way of life, embarks on a string of heists. On the case is local detective John Hunt (Casey Affleck), and Tucker soon finds himself torn between the peaceful life hes enjoyed with Jewel and his old criminal ways. Also starring Danny Glover and Tom Waits.

programme.title: Land Of the Blind
programme.desc: A soldier recounts his relationship with a famous political prisoner attempting to overthrow their countrys authoritarian government.

programme.title: Existenz
programme.desc: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.

programme.title: Slackers
programme.desc: Dave Goodman, Sam Schecter, and Jeff Davis are best friends who have spent almost four years at Holden University scamming their way through college. During one exam scam in their final semester Dave discovers Angela, and asks her out while writing his phone number on her exam sheet. Ethan Dulles (who calls himself "Cool Ethan"), a classmate obsessed with Angela to the extent of collecting loose hairs and making a hair doll and having surveillance photos and a shrine to Angela setup in his dorm room, takes her exam question sheet after Angela leaves and uses it to repeatedly confront and then blackmail the guys into setting up a successful date with Angela for him in exchange for his silence on the matter. The guys set Ethan up in multiple situations in an attempt to convince Angela to like him, while Dave tells Sam during their work researching her that Angela is no more important to him as any other scam theyve done. Ethan fails to attract her after frequent confrontations based on his delusional behavior, immaturity and ignorance of social norms. Though Ethan seems a lonely harmless nerd, he is scheming, psychotically obsessive and hopelessly socially incompetent.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: In Ronny Yus fast-moving crime-thriller, Samuel L Jackson plays Elmo McElroy, a pharmaceutical genius who has made a fortune in illegal drugs, particularly with Formula 51, which is more potent than heroin and crack. But instead of selling it to his drug lord employer the Lizard (Meatloaf), he flies to Liverpool where Felix (Robert Carlyle) is acting as broker for gangster Leopold Durant (Ricky Tomlinson). Durant is prepared to offer $20m for the formula; money Elmo would love to spend, if he can stay alive long enough.

programme.title: The Cooler
programme.desc: Bernie Lootz (William H. Macy) is a long-time "cooler" at the Shangri-La casino in Las Vegas: he is paid to bring his black cloud to any table where a gambler is on a roll. But when Bernies luck starts changing for the better--thanks in part to a pretty cocktail waitress--he suddenly loses his cooling talents, incurring the ire of the casino owner in the process.

programme.title: Trīs musketieri: Milēdija
programme.desc: Aleksandra Dimā leģendārā vēsturiskā piedzīvojumu romāna ekranizācijas otrā daļa. DArtanjana acu priekšā tiek nolaupīta Konstance. Lai glābtu mīļoto, musketieris ir spiests apvienot spēkus ar bezbailīgo un nežēlīgo Milēdiju. Taču karalisti sašķēluši reliģiskie kari un sācies Anglijas iebrukums. Atoss, Portoss un Aramiss jau ir pievienojušies frontei, un kāds sens noslēpums sagrauj vecās alianses.

programme.title: Viss visur vienlaikus
programme.desc: Veļas mazgātavas īpašniece Evelīna ir pārstrādājusies, atsvešinājusies no vīra un meitas, turklāt ģimenes bizness ir uz slēgšanas robežas. Viss kļūst vēl ļaunāk, kad Evelīna nonāk stingrās nodokļu inspektores Deirdres redzeslokā. Kādā no vizītēm ieņēmumu dienestā Evelīnas vīrs atklāj, ka ieradies no citas pasaules, lai uzticētu Evelīnai visa multiversa glābšanu. Ceļojot pa paralēlām pasaulēm, Evelīna iegūst gan jaunas spējas, gan iepazīst dažādās dzīves, kādas būtu varējusi dzīvot, ja jaunībā būtu pieņēmusi citus lēmumus Filma saņēmusi "Oskara" balvu 7 nominācijās, tostarp tādās kategorijās kā gada labākā filma, labākais režisors, labākais oriģinālscenārijs, labākās aktrises pirmā un otrā plāna lomās.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Saulains kajaka brauciens.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Netīrās dejas
programme.desc: Sešdesmitajos gados pareizā meitene Frēnsisa kopā ar ģimeni aizbrauc uz kūrortu atpūsties un kādā no saviesīgajiem vakariem iepazīstas ar deju instruktoru Džoniju, kura dzīves apstākļi krasi atšķiras no vides, kurā uzaugusi viņa. Daži likteņa pavērsieni, dažas sakritības, un meitene tiek ierauta dejas virpulī, kas izmainīs ne tikai viņas vasaru vien. Galvenajās lomās: Patriks Sveizijs, Dženifera Greja, Džerijs Orbaks

programme.title: Viss visur vienlaikus

programme.title: Gredzenu pavēlnieks: Gredzena brālība
programme.desc: Džona Ronalda Rūela Tolkīna par kulta literatūru kļuvušo episko romānu triloģijas pirmās daļas ekranizējums. Trīspadsmit Oskara nominācijas, četras balvas! Tas ir stāsts par labā cīņu ar ļauno, par īstu draudzību un upurēšanos. Stāsts, kas tālu pārsniedz iztēles robežas... kas kļuvis par mītu, par leģendu!

programme.title: Pianists
programme.desc: Polijas galvaspilsēta Varšava, 20. gadsimta 30. gadi. Poļu-ebreju mūziķis, pianists Vladislavs Špīlmans plūc panākumu laurus Polijā. Pienākot Otrajam pasaules karam, viņš brīnumainā kārtā izdzīvo pret ebrejiem vērstajā holokaustā. Špīlmans cīnās par izdzīvošanu kara plosītajā Varšavā un pēc kara atkal var pievērsties savai iemīļotajai nodarbei - klaviermūzikas spēlēšanai. Filmas panākumu kontā ir trīs "Oskari" kategorijās "Labākais galvenās lomas aktieris", "Labākais režisors" un "Labākais adaptētais scenārijs", kā arī vairākas Kinoakadēmijas un citu balvu nominācijas. 2016. gadā tā tika ierindota "BBC 100 labāko 21. gadsimta filmu" sarakstā.

programme.title: Fabelmeni
programme.desc: Augot Arizonā pēc Otrā pasaules kara, jaunais Semijs Fabelmens pusaudža gados vēlas kļūt par kinorežisoru. Drīz vien viņš atklāj satriecošu ģimenes noslēpumu un pēta, kā filmu spēks var palīdzēt viņam saskatīt patiesību.

programme.title: Gredzenu pavēlnieks. Divi torņi
programme.desc: Gredzena brālība sašķēlusies trīs grupās. Gredzens ir jānes uz Mordoru, jo visvareno talismanu iespējams iznīcināt tikai šai skarbajā novadā. Divi no hobitiem - gredzena nesējs Frodo un viņa draugs Sems - apmaldās kalnos un uzduras Golumam, dīvainam radījumam, kas savulaik pats nēsājis gredzenu un kura prātiņu sašķobījusi gredzena vara. Golums piesakās pavadīt abus uz Mordoru. Frodo ir ar mieru, bet Sems jaunajam paziņam neuzticas...

programme.title: Substance
programme.desc: Holivudas fitnesa zvaigznei Elizabetei ir viss, ko sieviete var vēlēties - skaistums, slava un ietekme. Taču pienāk laiks, kad vecuma pazīmes draud viņai to visu atņemt. Tādēļ brīdī, kad viņa uzzina par jauno produktu "Substance", kurš sola jaunāku un perfektāku sevi, viņa nevilcinās to izmēģināt.

programme.title: Trusis Džodžo
programme.desc: Neveiklais un vienaudžu atstumtais desmitgadīgais vācu puisēns Džodžo cenšas atrast savu vietu viņam tik neierastajā pasaulē. Lai kompensētu pazudušo tēvu un draugu neesamību, viņš rada sev iedomu draugu - Ādolfu Hitleru, kurš nemaz nav līdzīgs tā laika Trešā reiha vadonim. Taču reiz viņš nejauši atklāj, ka māte slēpj mājās ebreju meitenīti, un drīz vien Džodžo nāksies izdarīt izvēli par to, kas viņa dzīvē ir galvenais.

programme.title: Gredzenu pavēlnieks. Divi torņi
programme.desc: Gredzena brālība sašķēlusies trīs grupās. Gredzens ir jānes uz Mordoru, jo visvareno talismanu iespējams iznīcināt tikai šai skarbajā novadā. Divi no hobitiem - gredzena nesējs Frodo un viņa draugs Sems - apmaldās kalnos un uzduras Golumam, dīvainam radījumam, kas savulaik pats nēsājis gredzenu un kura prātiņu sašķobījusi gredzena vara. Golums piesakās pavadīt abus uz Mordoru. Frodo ir ar mieru, bet Sems jaunajam paziņam neuzticas...

programme.title: Tolkīns
programme.desc: "Vienīgais lēmums, kas tev jāpieņem - ko darīt ar tev doto laiku," reiz sacījis slavenais rakstnieks Džons Ronalds Rūels Tolkīns, grāmatu "Hobits" un "Gredzenu pavēlnieks" autors. Biogrāfiskā filma sekos Tolkīna kļūšanai par rakstnieku un ved cauri viņa skolas gadiem, kad bez vecākiem palikušais Tolkīns atrod draudzību, mīlestību un radošo iedvesmu starp citiem skolā atstumtajiem. Diemžēl draudzības saites un Tolkīna aizraušanos ar literatūru draud sagraut Pirmais pasaules karš...

programme.title: Apalīte
programme.desc: Vilovdīna (Pelmenīte) ir lielo izmēru modele, meita bijušaji skaistuma karalienei, pieteikusies savas mammas rīkotajā skaistumkonkursā - kā protesta akciju, kas drīz vien izvēršas plašumā un viņas pēdās seko daudzi, izmainot skaistumkonkursus un nelielo Teksasas pilsētu.

programme.title: Karaliskā spēle
programme.desc: Lai izturētu Gestapo psiholoģisko teroru, nacistu ieslodzīts jurists mieru atrod šaha pasaulē.

programme.title: Deiva banka
programme.desc: Balstoties uz Deiva Fišvika patiesiem dzīves piedzīvojumiem, filma "Deiva banka" stāsta par to, kā strādnieku šķiras iedzīvotājs no Bērnlijas un pašizveidots miljonārs cīnījās, lai izveidotu kopienas banku.

programme.title: Pilnīgi nesaderīgi
programme.desc: Filma balstīta uz patiesiem notikumiem. Kāds izbijis noziedznieks Dells, būdams probācijas uzraudzībā, meklē fiktīvu darbu, lai atšūtu savu probācijas uzraugu. Tomēr plāni nojūk, jo smagi paralizētais Filips patiešām nolemj viņu pieņemt darbā par aprūpētāju. Viņi tiešām ir pilnīgi nesaderīgi, bet tas nostrādā abiem par labu, jo Dells ar savu pārdrošumu un aizrautību izrauj Filipu no dzīves apātijas, bet Dells iegūst labu draugu, lai gan arī viņam dzīvē nemaz tik viegli nav klājies... Braiena Krenstona nosvērtais šarms un Kevina Hārta eksplozīvais raksturs un nepārspējamais humors rada unikālu saspēli, kas ievelk ikvienu skatītāju aizraujošā stāsta virpuļos.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pavasara krāsas.

programme.title: Pilnīgi nesaderīgi
programme.desc: Filma balstīta uz patiesiem notikumiem. Kāds izbijis noziedznieks Dells, būdams probācijas uzraudzībā, meklē fiktīvu darbu, lai atšūtu savu probācijas uzraugu. Tomēr plāni nojūk, jo smagi paralizētais Filips patiešām nolemj viņu pieņemt darbā par aprūpētāju. Viņi tiešām ir pilnīgi nesaderīgi, bet tas nostrādā abiem par labu, jo Dells ar savu pārdrošumu un aizrautību izrauj Filipu no dzīves apātijas, bet Dells iegūst labu draugu, lai gan arī viņam dzīvē nemaz tik viegli nav klājies... Braiena Krenstona nosvērtais šarms un Kevina Hārta eksplozīvais raksturs un nepārspējamais humors rada unikālu saspēli, kas ievelk ikvienu skatītāju aizraujošā stāsta virpuļos.

programme.title: Deiva banka
programme.desc: Balstoties uz Deiva Fišvika patiesiem dzīves piedzīvojumiem, filma "Deiva banka" stāsta par to, kā strādnieku šķiras iedzīvotājs no Bērnlijas un pašizveidots miljonārs cīnījās, lai izveidotu kopienas banku.

programme.title: Karaliskā spēle
programme.desc: Lai izturētu Gestapo psiholoģisko teroru, nacistu ieslodzīts jurists mieru atrod šaha pasaulē.

programme.title: Pilnīgi nesaderīgi
programme.desc: Filma balstīta uz patiesiem notikumiem. Kāds izbijis noziedznieks Dells, būdams probācijas uzraudzībā, meklē fiktīvu darbu, lai atšūtu savu probācijas uzraugu. programme.title: Deiva banka
programme.desc: Balstoties uz Deiva Fišvika patiesiem dzīves piedzīvojumiem, filma "Deiva banka" stāsta par to, kā strādnieku šķiras iedzīvotājs no Bērnlijas un pašizveidots miljonārs cīnījās, lai izveidotu kopienas banku.

programme.title: Privilēģijas būt vienam
programme.desc: Čārlijs ir introverts pusaudzis un noraizējies, kā viņam klāsies jaunajā skolā. Viņš vēl nenojauš, ka nāksies piedzīvot gan pirmo mīlestību, labākā drauga pašnāvību un paša mentālas problēmas, cenšoties atrast vienaudžu grupu, kurai justies piederīgam. Jautrs un aizkustinošs stāsts par pusaudžu problēmām, kura pamatā ir Stīvena Čobska tāda paša nosaukuma bestsellers, kas jau kļuvis par mūsdienu klasiku. Filma aizraujoši un patiesi attēlo kāpumus un kritumus pusaudža ceļā uz pilngadību. Galvenajās lomās: Logans Lermans, Emma Vatsone, Ezra Millers

programme.title: Rifkina festivāls
programme.desc: Vudija Allena 50. kinofilmas darbība norisinās skaistākajā un romantiskākajā Spānijas piekrastes pilsētā Sevastjanā, kura katru gadu pulcē kino industrijas pārstāvjus kino festivālā. Turp dodas arī kompleksu māktais rakstnieks Morts Rifkins, kurš ir aizrautīgs kino mīļotājs. Festivālā viņš pavada savu skaisto sievu Sjū, kura pilda jauna režisora publicistes pienākumus. Morts ir pārliecināts, ka ceļojums piešķils asumu attiecībās ar sievu, taču situāciju pamatīgi sarežģī sievas klients, kuru arī apbūrusi gan Spānijas dienvidu romantika... gan Morta sieva.

programme.title: Eleonoras rigbijas pazušana
programme.desc: Konors un Eleonora dzīvo Manhetenā. Viņi ir precējušies vairākus gadus, tomēr joprojām ir ļoti dažādi. Viņam pieder neliels restorāns. Viņas ģimene (tēvs profesors un māte vijolniece) savulaik ne sevišķi atbalstīja meitas izvēli. Konora tēvu dēla dzīve neinteresē vispār. Konora un Eleonoras dzīvē tam visam nav nekādas nozīmes, jo viņi ir radījuši savu mīlestības pilno pasauli. Dramatiski notikumi sagrauj rūpīgi radīto pasaulīti un Eleonora nolemj… izgaist…

programme.title: Privilēģijas būt vienam

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Ina Garten and Bobby Flay discuss their culinary careers while enjoying cherry pistachio biscotti, sweet coffee, and fresh pasta.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Ina invites journalist Frank Bruni to the barn. They enjoy parmesan thyme crackers and Ina gives him a fool-proof gruyere and herb omelette lesson.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Irvine is ready for any challenge he is challenged to overcome culinary obstacles and deliver a delicious meal before his time runs out. With new challenges from this exciting, fun-loving chef, viewers will see if Robert can make dinner, possible!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Paul Hollywood City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood City Bakes is hosted by the British most loved baker, Paul Hollywood, who explores 10 cities around the globe. He is looking for the family bakeries, corner delis and luxury hotels which have created the baking heritage of entire cities. From Cape Town to Reykjavik, Paul will personally guide into the tastiest baking to be found there, each cities own culture and unique history. Exploring the sights of each city Paul gets inspired and creates two unique recipes of his own.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is cooking up her most delicious and memorable suppers from her early days on the farm. Shes making two hearty upper-Midwest classics for a weeknight dinner with her husband Nick and his parents including Chicken Pot Hot Dish and a Sweet Cookie "Salad" with Homemade Cookies and Mandarins. She then honors her "Pizza Friday" tradition by making tasty Sausage and Broccolini Pizza Pockets to be enjoyed out on the tractor with Nick.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: The sibling bakers share family trip memories by making vacation desserts that reimagine a memorable food experience from a location they visited.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: The bakers begin by decorating oversized sugar cookies. Later, the three finalists must make extravagant surprise cakes for guest judge Robert Lucas.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: The sibling bakers share family trip memories by making vacation desserts that reimagine a memorable food experience from a location they visited.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: The bakers begin by decorating oversized sugar cookies. Later, the three finalists must make extravagant surprise cakes for guest judge Robert Lucas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and host Eric Adjepong welcome three aspiring shellfish experts and watch them cook up a storm, as they go through two rounds of cooking. The hosts select their favourite contestant and dish, after which they discuss the judges comments.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and host Eric Adjepong welcome three aspiring shellfish experts and watch them cook up a storm, as they go through two rounds of cooking. The hosts select their favourite contestant and dish, after which they discuss the judges comments.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Bake It til You Make It
programme.desc: Food Network ditches the studio to follow seven gifted amateur bakers. Theyre hitting the road to submit their best desserts in baking competitions across America, all while pursuing the sweetest taste in the world: victory.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Bake It til You Make It

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Fuhrer 2.0
programme.desc: Is history repeating itself before our eyes? A documentary examines the shocking similarities between two dictators, Adolf Hitler and Vladimir Putin. Despite a 66-year age gap, their methods are identical: from the suppression of freedoms and nationalist propaganda to bloody wars of aggression. The filmmakers explore how childhood trauma and domestic violence shaped the characters of future tyrants, and compare their military strategies—from the devastation of World War II to modern aggression in Ukraine, Georgia, and Syria. A deep psychological portrait of those who brought the world to the brink of disaster.

programme.title: News reports
programme.desc: The program delivers comprehensive reports on current events, providing viewers with detailed information on politics, society, economy, and culture. Episodes present facts clearly and objectively, offering analysis and context to help audiences understand complex issues. By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

programme.title: The Last Day of the Dictator

programme.title: Goals
programme.desc: "Targets" is a documentary project about the incredible strength of the human spirit. These are sincere confessions of soldiers, medics, and civilians who went through the hell of war, captivity, and severe injuries. Stories about how not to break down when it seems that everything is lost, and how the state helps heroes find their way back to life.

programme.title: Dzeguze
programme.desc: Septiņpadsmitgadniece Grēthena spiesta pārcelties kopā ar ģimeni uz vietu, kur nekas nav tā, kā izskatās.

programme.title: Strāvas karš
programme.desc: Dramatisks sāncensības stāsts par elektrības atklāšanas laikmeta titāniem Tomasu Edisonu un Džordžu Vestinghausu, lai noskaidrotu, kura izgudrotā elektriskā sistēma būs noteicošā modernizētajā pasaulē.

programme.title: Mēs visi svešinieki
programme.desc: Šajā aizkustinošajā, provokatīvajā stāstā par mīlestību, ģimeni un pagātnes rēgiem Ādams dzīvo vientuļu dzīvi, taču kādu vakaru viņu apciemo noslēpumains kaimiņš, kurš uzjundī sen apspiestas jūtas un atmiņas. Abu starpā rodas saikne un nenoliedzamas simpātijas, un Ādams nonāk savā bērnības mājā, kurā 30 gadus pēc nāves šķietami dzīvo viņa vecāki.

programme.title: Mazulīte
programme.desc: Augsta līmeņa vadītāja liek uz spēles savu karjeru un ģimeni, kad sāk kaislīgas attiecības ar krietni jaunāku praktikantu.

programme.title: Dzīves grāmata
programme.desc: Meksikas pilsētā Sanandželā Manolo, Marija un Džoakvins laiku pavadījuši kopā jau kopš bērnības. Lai arī viņu dzīves ir bijušas atšķirīgas - Marija tika nosūtīta uz Eiropu, Džoakvins pievienojās armijai, bet Manolo studēja un kļuva par cīkstoni - viena lieta nemainījās. Manolo un Džoakvins abi vēlas apprecēt Mariju.

programme.title: Palaidnīgā feja
programme.desc: gadus jaunajai zobu fejai Violetai maģija nešķiet īpaši aizraujoša, tāpēc viņa vienīgā nespēj nokārtot eksāmenu, lai iegūtu kristālu, kas fejām ļauj iekļūt cilvēku pasaulē. Violeta neļauj skumjām vaļu, nozog kristālu citai fejai un nokļūst 12 gadus vecās bārenītes Maksijas istabā. Tomēr, ak vai! Kristāls saplīst, un nu Violeta ir iesprostota cilvēku pasaulē! Kopā ar Maksiju viņa meklē atpakaļceļu un atklāj savu patieso aicinājumu.

programme.title: Amerikas maģisko melnādaino biedrība
programme.desc: Jauns vīrietis tiek uzņemts noslēpumainā biedrībā, kurā darbojas maģiski melnādainie cilvēki, kas veltī savu dzīvi augstākā mērķa īstenošanai: atvieglot baltajiem cilvēkiem dzīvi.

programme.title: X+Y
programme.desc: Zēns, matemātikas ģēnijs ar saskarsmes grūtībām dzīvē un vienaudžu vidū, rod pašpārliecību un jaunus draugus starp britu skolēnu komandas biedriem Starptautiskajā matemātikas olimpiādē.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets: Lielā sadursme
programme.desc: Skreta (Kriss Vedžs) nepārtrauktie pūliņi noglabāt savu zīli, liek viņam izraisīt negadījumu virkni, kuru rezultātā asteroīdi sāk traukties uz Zemi. Haoss liek Manijam (Rejs Romano), Djego (Deniss Līrijs), Sidam (Džons Legvizamo) un viņu ģimenēm meklēt patvērumu. Piedzīvojumu meklētāja zebiekste Baks (Saimons Pegs) viņus brīdina, ka var sākties masveida izmiršana, kas liek draugiem meklēt jaunu mājvietu, pa ceļam satiekot citus dzīvniekus un apmeklējot eksotiskas vietas.

programme.title: Ledus laikmets 4: Kontinentu dreifs
programme.desc: Skrats netīšām izraisa kontinentālu kataklizmu, kuras rezultātā Menijs tiek nošķirts no Elijas un Persikas. Viņš atrodas uz aisberga kopā ar Djego, Sidu un Omīti, taču apņemas atgriezties mājās. Pēc šiem satriecošajiem notikumiem Sids satiek sen neredzētus ģimenes locekļus, turklāt draugiem būs jātiek galā ar dažādiem jauniem personāžiem, kuri apņēmušies liegt viņiem atgriezties mājās.

programme.title: Džeisons Borns
programme.desc: Bijusī CIP slepenā aģente Nikija Pārsone (Džūlija Stailza) reiz palīdzēja Bornam (Mets Deimons), pēc tam nozuda un šobrīd strādā kopā ar ziņotāju, kurš gatavojas nodot atklātībā CIP slepenās specoperācijas. Nikija ielaužas CIP sistēmā un lejupielādē visu, kas saistīts ar specoperācijām, tostarp operāciju "Dzirnakmens", kurā piedalījās Borns. CIP aģente Hetera Lī (Alīsija Vikandere) atklāj ielaušanos un par to ziņo CIP direktoram Robertam Dūvijam (Tomijs Lī Džonss), kurš ir specoperāciju galvenais vadītājs.

programme.title: Žanna Dibarī. Karaļa favorīte
programme.desc: Stāsts par karaļa Luija XV pēdējo oficiālo mīļāko Dibarī kundzi.

programme.title: Bridžita Džounsa: Kā traka pēc viņa
programme.desc: Bridžita atkal ir viena un audzina 9 gadus veco Billiju un 4 gadus veco Meibelu. Iestrēgusi emocionālā nestabilitātē, viņa audzina bērnus ar uzticīgā drauga un bijušā mīļākā Daniela Klīvera palīdzību. Taču tad viņas dzīvē negaidīti uzrodas vēl kāds vīrietis.

programme.title: Pasaules gala mednieki
programme.desc: Pēc tam kad milzīga saules uzliesmojuma dēļ tiek iznīcināta Zemes austrumu puslode, drosmīgs algots dārgumu mednieks dodas uz Eiropu, lai atrastu iekāroto "Monu Lizu", taču drīz saprot, ka pasaulei šobrīd vajag varoni vairāk nekā gleznu.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: Stāsts par pasaules pirmā viedtālruņa galvu reibinošajiem panākumiem un katastrofālo kritienu.

programme.title: Līdz pēdējam
programme.desc: Filmu "Amerikāņu skaistums" un "Optimista stāsts" veidotāji piedāvā uz patiesiem notikumiem balstītu stāstu par leģendāro bokseri Viniju Pacienca, kurš 1991. gadā cieta smagā autokatastrofā, gūstot smagu mugurkaula traumu. Kamēr ārsti nesolīja neko labu un ieteica Vinijam aizmirst par sportista karjeru, viņš pilnīgā slepenībā sāka apmeklēt sporta zāli un jau pēc trim mēnešiem atgriezās ringā.

programme.title: Eliots: pats mazākais ziemeļbriedis
programme.desc: Eliots ir mazs zirdziņš, kuram ir ļoti liels sapnis, - ieņemt godpilno vietu Ziemassvētku vecīša ziemeļbriežu pajūgā, lai dāvātu bērniem prieku svētkos. Pēc tam kad Ziemassvētku vecītis nāk klajā ar paziņojumu, ka tūlīt dosies pensija, mazajam Eliotam atliek vien tikai trīs dienas, lai pieradītu pārējiem, ka viņš ir šī goda cienīgs, neskatoties uz to, ka viņam nav atbilstošu ragu. Ja kaut ko ļoti vēlies no visas sirds, tad brīnumi notiek, vai ne?

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Mīlīgā mazpilsētiņā atrodas melna māja ar nedzīvu zālāju. Kaimiņi pat nenojauš, ka zem mājas atrodas milzu paslēptuve. Sīku pakalpiņu armijas apsargāts, Grū kaldina plānus lielākajai laupīšanai pasaules vēsturē. Viņš ir iecerējis nolaupīt Mēnesi. Jā, Mēnesi! Grū patīk viss ļaunais. Bruņojies ar samazināšanas lāzeru, sasaldēšanas staru un dažnedažādiem kaujas transporta līdzekļiem braukšanai pa zemi un pa gaisu, viņš iznīdē visu, kas gadās ceļā, līdz kādu dienu sastop trīs bārenītes ar apbrīnojamu gribasspēku…

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: Animācijas filmas "Ledus laikmets" veidotāji sagatavojuši jaunu piedzīvojumu komēdiju visai ģimenei. Blū ir pieradināts papagailis, kas tā arī nav iemācījies lidot. Viņš visu mūžu baudījis ērtības Minesotas štata mazpilsētā, kur dzīvo kopā ar savu saimnieci Lindu. Blū un Linda ir pārliecināti, ka viņš ir pēdējais savas sugas pārstāvis, taču, kad izrādās, ka Riodežaneiro dzīvo arī krāšņā Džuela, abi dodas uz turieni, lai viņu uzmeklētu. Jau drīz vien pēc ierašanās Blū un Džuelu nolaupa eksotisko dzīvnieku tirgotāji. Taču Džuela ir radusi pie dzīves pilsētas ielās, un ar vairāku runājošu putnu palīdzību viņiem izdodas tikt brīvībā. Draugu un Džuelas iedrošināts, Blū beidzot iemācīsies lidot, lai varētu atgriezties pie savas labākās draudzenes Lindas.

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: Blū, Pērle un viņu trīs bērni dzīvo mājas idillē burvīgajā Riodežaneiro pilsētā. Kad Pērle nolemj, ka bērniem jāmācās dzīvot īstu putnu dzīvi, viņa uzstāj, ka ģimenei jādodas uz Amazoni. Blū, cenšoties sadraudzēties ar jaunajiem kaimiņiem, baidās zaudēt Pērli un bērnus, kuri ļaujas savvaļas dzīves aicinājumam.

programme.title: Tauriņa stāsts
programme.desc: Tuvojoties ziemai, monarhu tauriņi migrē uz dienvidiem, lai pārziemotu siltumā. Taču Patrika spārni vēl nav gatavi tālajam ceļam un viņš nevar lidot. Nedomādams padoties, Patriks kopā ar savu labāko draugu kāpuru Mārtiju paslēpjas pārtikas treilerī, kuru velk Dženifera. Tomēr arī viņai ir savas bažas par ceļojumu, jo - tauriņam neierasti - viņu māc bailes no augstuma. Visus trīs gaida daudz piedzīvojumu un sūri gūtu mācību, līdz mērķis būs sasniegts.

programme.title: Šreks: ilgi un laimīgi
programme.desc: Cilvēkēdājs Šreks jau uzveicis ļaunu pūķi, atbrīvojis skaistu princesi un izglābis sievas ģimenes pārvaldīto karaļvalsti, bet tagad, pēc visa piedzīvotā, Šreks sāk ilgoties pēc vecās, labās cilvēkēdāja dzīves, kad ciema iedzīvotāji no viņa baidījās, nevis prasīja autogrāfus. Tāpēc, nedomājot par sekām, zaļais milzis noslēdz vienošanos ar viltīgo Rumpelrūķi. Parakstot līgumu, Šreks attopas ačgārnā un greizā Tāltālajā. Lai glābtu draugus, atjaunotu kārtību savā pasaulē un atgūtu Fionu, Šrekam būs krietni jāpacīnās.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ir pagājis labs laiks kopš Ziemassvētkiem, kad Makkalisteru ģimene, dodoties brīvdienās, pirmo reizi aizmirsa mājās Kevinu. Šos Ziemassvētkus Kevins nolēmis pavadīt sava tēta bagātās draudzenes Natālijas milzīgajā savrupmājā. Taču mierīgais vakars viņam kārtējo reizi izvēršas par īstu piedzīvojumu, jo Natālijas māju svētkos nolēmuši apciemot zagļi. Starp citu, vienam no viņiem ar Kevinu ir kārtojami veci rēķini!

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Baksteru ģimene pārceļas uz dzīvi citā štatā, taču 10 gadus veco Finnu biedē jaunā māja, jo viņš uzskata, ka tajā spokojas. Kamēr puisēns izliek slazdus, lai notvertu "spoku", viņa vecāki aizkavējas citā pilsētas malā, un viņš paliek mājās kopā ar māsu. Tikmēr trīs zagļi vēlas iegūt ārkārtīgi dārgu gleznu, kuru bijušais īpašnieks paslēpis slepenā telpā. Vai viņiem izdosies iegūt kāroto un uzvarēt kaujā mazo gudrinieku?

programme.title: Ledus laikmets 3: Dinozauru ēra
programme.desc: Filmu "Ledus laikmets" un "Ledus Laikmets 2" varoņi ir atgriezušies - gatavi jauniem piedzīvojumiem. Skrets joprojām nododas nenotveramās zīles medībām. Menijs un Elija gaida mazuļa piedzimšanu, sliņķis Sids mēģina iztēloties ģimenes dzīvi, rūpējoties par nočieptām dinozaura olām, bet zobenzobu tīģeris Djego apsver, vai viņš nav kļuvis pārāk mīkstčaulīgs, tik daudz laika pavadot draugu kompānijā. Dodoties glābt nelaimē nokļuvušo Sidu, draugi nokļūst neparastā pazemes pasaulē, kur aci pret aci sastopas ar dinozauriem un ir spiesti cīnīties gan ar zvēriem, gan augiem.

programme.title: Pēdējais ceļojums
programme.desc: Filips un Fredriks, pazīstams Zviedrijas TV duets, dodas ceļojumā uz Franciju ar mērķi atjaunot dzirksti Filipa tēva dzīvei.

programme.title: Bridžita Džounsa: Kā traka pēc viņa
programme.desc: Bridžita atkal ir viena un audzina 9 gadus veco Billiju un 4 gadus veco Meibelu. Iestrēgusi emocionālā nestabilitātē, viņa audzina bērnus ar uzticīgā drauga un bijušā mīļākā Daniela Klīvera palīdzību. Taču tad viņas dzīvē negaidīti uzrodas vēl kāds vīrietis.

programme.title: Zaļknābis pie stūres
programme.desc: Viņš ir ļoti jauns un prot ļoti ātri un labi braukt, kad jātiek prom no nozieguma vietas. Tas ir neviens cits kā labākais auto vadītājs, saukts par Mazo. Kad Mazais satiek savu sapņu meiteni, viņš vēlas pamest noziedzīgo pasauli. Taču tas nav tik vienkārši, kā šķiet, kad Mazais tiek iesaistīts vēl vienā noziegumā, kas apdraud viņa dzīvi, mīlestību un brīvību.

programme.title: Sliktais leitnants
programme.desc: Glābjot pēc viesuļvētras Katrīna cietuma kamerā iesprostotu cietumnieku, Jaunorleānas policijas seržants Terenss Makdona ieguva apbalvojumu, paaugstinājumu par leitnantu, muguras ievainojumu, kas sāpēs visu atlikušo dzīvi, un pieeju sāpes remdējošām zālēm. Reiz Terenss bija tiešām labs policists, bet nu viena nepareiza izvēle ved pie nākamās, līdz beidzot ne tikai Terensa karjera, bet arī viņa paša dzīvība izrādās briesmās.

programme.title: EuroLeague. Panathinaikos - Zalgiris Kaunas
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.desc: Basketball live game.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Atletico Madrid - Real Sociedad
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Sešu nāciju kauss. Skotija – Francija
programme.desc: The Six Nations Championship is an annual international mens rugby union competition between the rugby teams of England, France, Ireland, Italy, Scotland, and Wales. Its format is quite simple: each team plays every other team once making a total of 15 matches, with home ground advantage alternating from one year to the next. The current champions are England, who won the 2020 tournament.

programme.title: UFC. Josh Emmett-Kevin Vallejos
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Womens MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: Flipping 101 with Tarek El Moussa
programme.desc: Facing obstacles at every turn, such as unexpected construction delays and dilapidated interiors, Tarek El Moussa will help these flipping newcomers navigate costly mistakes as they race to get a renovated property on the market.

programme.title: Castle Impossible
programme.desc: Daphne and Ian set out to makeover the existing castle playroom fit for the little princes and princesses who visit the castle.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Many projects still remain, including the partially-revealed original stone exteriors, roofing, decking, new handrails for the balconies, landscaping, and the master bedroom for Chase and Sarah, and the crew must rally to finish the house on By the April 1st deadline.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home

programme.title: My Mortgage Free Home
programme.desc: Property series. Amanda Lamb is on a mission to help people achieve their dream: to find their perfect house and leave behind the shackles of mortgage payments. Property expert Amanda finds four properties and invites homeowners to view them. Will they find their ideal home and relocate without the burden of monthly mortgage repayments?

programme.title: Mediterranean Life
programme.desc: Few places share the magical sparkle of the Mediterranean coastline, with many dreaming of one day purchasing property in this idyllic region. This reality series follows potential homeowners from the US as they look to find their dream property on the Med. From the extravagant luxuries of the French Riviera to the slower pace of life on the island of Sicily, each destination is engulfed in picturesque beaches, turquoise waters and unparalleled culture.

programme.title: The Weekend Workshop
programme.desc: Captivating docu-reality series in which a team of extremely talented people redesign and reinvent various forgotten and unused household items, breathing new life into them. Meet DIY lover Kate Humble, designer and re-inventor Max McMurdo, and up-cycler Zoe Pocock who will tackle a variety of exciting projects such as building a pizza oven, outdoor hot tub made from a Land Rover, transforming an old television set into a cocktail cabinet, and many more.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A couples ready to go from two homes to one in Wilton Manors, Florida. Theyre looking for a great water view with yard space for their pups.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A blended family of seven hunt for a lakefront home in Minnesota. Can they find a house with a sandy beach on Mille Lacs Lake?

programme.title: Fix My Frankenhouse
programme.desc: Boston-based home renovation experts and husband-wife team Mike and Denese Butler fix what they refer to as "Frankenstein" houses. These are older homes that have become filled with wonky layouts, misplaced staircases and maze-like hallways as different owners make changes over the years. Mike employs his construction know-how to create a functional flow, while Denese will capture the clients style with custom finishes. By blending elements of the older homes charm with modern design, the couple will produce stunning and cohesive spaces. Throughtout the episodes, Mike and Denese will overcome choppy rooms and wasted square footage for clients and work with their dads -- master carpenters John Butler and Peter Doyle -- to deliver one-of-a-kind projects for each family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Mediterranean Life

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A Virginia couple, tired of staying with family while visiting Kill Devil Hills, wants their own piece of paradise. They would like something move-in ready with a fenced yard for their dogs that they can rent for a few years.

programme.title: My Mortgage Free Home

Property expert Amanda finds four properties and invites homeowners to view them. Will they find their ideal home and relocate without the burden of monthly mortgage repayments?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Is this home security video proof that UFOs are messing with our technology? Did a species of carnivorous marsupials thought to be long extinct just get caught on camera?
